# VertexData

A single vertex as supplied in raw Mesh args.

## Parameters

- `pos`: An array of 3 floats. Vertex position `[x, y, z]` in model space.
- `color`: An array of 3 floats. Vertex colour `[r, g, b]` in [0, 1]. Use `[0.75, 0.74, 0.72]` for a neutral surface that takes the material albedo.
- `uv`: An array of 2 floats. Texture coordinates in [0, 1] space.  Defaults to [0, 0] when omitted.
